text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Hey.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I wanna stop by a bookstore.

At Narita Taishin's request, we head<n>to a nearby
shopping mall in search<n>of a bookstore.
choice_data_list: So what are you looking to buy?
So what are you looking to buy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Oh, I'm not buying anything for<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Actually, it's none of your business.<n>I'll only be
gone a second, so just<n>wait for me here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fancy seeing you here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... See you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Hey!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm? What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are, uh... Are the books there part of<n>that series
Hayahide likes?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Oh, yeah. I remember seeing a<n>bunch of
them on her bookshelves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You gonna buy more for her?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide's freakin' overbearing and<n>annoying,
and there's no shutting her<n>up once she gets
started on<n>something...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But... she also helps me out a lot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sounds like her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She's a total busybody, talks in the<n>most bizarre
way, and her thought<n>process is weird as hell,
but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I get you. She helps me out a lot too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can you show me what other<n>books she
might like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sure, I can help out for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, I'm back. Let's go.

I didn't mean to eavesdrop, but I<n>actually
overheard their whole<n>conversation.
choice_data_list: I'm sure Hayahide will be thrilled.

text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to eavesdrop, but I<n>actually
overheard their whole<n>conversation.
choice_data_list: I'm sure Hayahide will be thrilled.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what are you talking<n>about?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Stop sticking your nose in things that<n>aren't your
business, unless you<n>want me to kick your butt!

I may have angered Narita Taishin,<n>but it's still
heartwarming to see how<n>thoughtful she actually
is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Kay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So what kinda books do you like?

Our conversation on the way back<n>home feels a bit
livelier than usual.
